Larry Burger LA Mousse Hash brings bold flavour and powerful relaxation together in a premium, solventless concentrate. Because this is LA Mousse Hash, the texture stays light, fluffy, and aerated. As a result, it’s easy to handle, melts cleanly, and burns evenly whether mixed with flower or enjoyed on its own.
